title: IBM-Aberdeen: Storage Change Brings Opportunities (Sales Team Workshop)
author: Aberdeen Group (Peter S. Kastner et al.)
abstract: Aberdeen Group sales team workshop deck prepared for IBM on Storage Pools and Information Lifecycle Management (ILM). Introduces Aberdeen's DSET C-level framework (Drivers, Strategies, Enablers, Technology) and demonstrates how research agenda sponsorship, value assessment tools, and installed base assessments accelerate IBM storage sales through Aberdeen's ~150,000 registered user research community. Flag: Aberdeen-Confidential / internal IBM enablement.
importance_rationale: Illustrates Aberdeen's mid-2000s sales acceleration playbook for storage vendors using research-sponsorship funnels. Documents Aberdeen's DSET framework and demographic reach at its operating peak.
relevance_rationale: Research-sponsorship sales enablement patterns persist in analyst-relations practices; ILM/storage pool framing predates cloud-era storage tiering but mechanics recur in hybrid-cloud lifecycle tools.
prescience_rationale: Primarily descriptive sales enablement; limited explicit predictions beyond Q2-2004 research agenda preview.
